name: projectNameMissing
sql:

WHERE p.project_id = $1

label_de: Orte (relevante und aktuell existierende) ohne Geometrie
label_en: Places (relevant and currently existing) without geometry
label_fr: Lieux (pertinents et actuellement existants) sans géométrie
label_it: Luoghi (rilevanti e attualmente esistenti) senza geometria
name: placesGeometryMissing
sql:
SELECT p.label, '/data/projects/' || sp.project_id || '/subprojects/' || p.subproject_id || '/places/' || p.place_id || '/place' AS url
FROM places p
JOIN subprojects sp ON sp.subproject_id = p.subproject_id
WHERE p.subproject_id = $1
  AND p.relevant_for_reports = true
  AND (p.until IS NULL
  OR p.until >= date_part('year', now())::integer)
  AND p.geometry IS NULL
ORDER BY p.label

label_de: Orte (relevante und aktuell existierende) ohne Seit wann
label_en: Places (relevant and currently existing) without since date

name: placesSinceMissing
sql:
SELECT p.label, '/data/projects/' || sp.project_id || '/subprojects/' || p.subproject_id || '/places/' || p.place_id || '/place' AS url
FROM places p
JOIN subprojects sp ON sp.subproject_id = p.subproject_id
WHERE p.subproject_id = $1
  AND p.relevant_for_reports = true
  AND (p.until IS NULL
  OR p.until >= date_part('year', now())::integer)
  AND p.since IS NULL
ORDER BY p.label

name: placesChecksMissing
sql:
SELECT p.label, '/data/projects/' || sp.project_id || '/subprojects/' || p.subproject_id || '/places/' || p.place_id || '/place' AS url
FROM places p
JOIN subprojects sp ON sp.subproject_id = p.subproject_id
WHERE p.subproject_id = $1
  AND p.relevant_for_reports = true
  AND (p.until IS NULL
  OR p.until >= date_part('year', now())::integer)
  AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1
FROM checks c
WHERE c.place_id = p.place_id)
ORDER BY p.label

label_de: Orte (relevante und aktuell existierende) ohne Kontrolle in Jahr
label_en: Places (relevant and currently existing) without check in year
label_fr: Lieux (pertinents et actuellement existants) sans contrôle dans l'année
label_it: Luoghi (rilevanti e attualmente esistenti) senza controllo nell'anno
name: placesChecksMissingInYear
sql:

WHERE p.subproject_id = $1
  AND p.relevant_for_reports = true
  AND (p.until IS NULL

label_en: Places (relevant and currently existing) level 1 without level 2

name: places1Places2Missing
sql:
SELECT p.label, '/data/projects/' || s.project_id || '/subprojects/' || p.subproject_id || '/places/' || p.place_id || '/place' AS url
FROM places p
JOIN subprojects s ON s.subproject_id = p.subproject_id
WHERE p.subproject_id = $1
  AND p.level = 1
  AND p.relevant_for_reports = true
  AND (p.until IS NULL
  OR p.until >= date_part('year', now())::integer)
  AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1
FROM places p2
WHERE p2.parent_id = p.place_id)
ORDER BY p.label

name: placeUsersUserMissing
sql:
SELECT pu.label, '/data/projects/' || sp.project_id || '/subprojects/' || p.subproject_id || '/places/' || pu.place_id || '/users/' || pu.place_user_id || '/' AS url
FROM place_users pu
JOIN places p ON p.place_id = pu.place_id
JOIN subprojects sp ON sp.subproject_id = p.subproject_id
WHERE p.subproject_id = $1
  AND pu.user_id IS NULL
ORDER BY pu.label

label_en: Place report quantities: default unit not used
label_fr: Quantités de rapport de lieu : unité par défaut non utilisée
label_it: Quantità di rapporto di luogo: unità predefinita non utilizzata
name: placeReportQuantitiesNoDefault
sql:
SELECT p.label, '/data/projects/' || sp.project_id || '/subprojects/' || p.subproject_id || '/places/' || p.place_id || '/place' AS url
FROM places p
JOIN subprojects sp ON sp.subproject_id = p.subproject_id
JOIN projects proj ON proj.project_id = sp.project_id
WHERE p.subproject_id = $1
  AND p.relevant_for_reports = true
  AND (p.until IS NULL
  OR p.until >= date_part('year', now())::integer)
  AND proj.place_reports_default_unit_id IS NOT NULL
  AND EXISTS (SELECT 1
FROM place_reports pr
JOIN place_report_quantities prq ON prq.place_report_id = pr.place_report_id
WHERE pr.place_id = p.place_id
  AND prq.unit_id != proj.place_reports_default_unit_id)
ORDER BY p.label

label_en: Check quantities: default unit not used
label_fr: Quantités de contrôle : unité par défaut non utilisée
label_it: Quantità di controllo: unità predefinita non utilizzata
name: checkQuantitiesNoDefault
sql:
SELECT c.label, '/data/projects/' || sp.project_id || '/subprojects/' || p.subproject_id || '/places/' || c.place_id || '/checks/' || c.check_id || '/check' AS url
FROM checks c
JOIN places p ON p.place_id = c.place_id
JOIN subprojects sp ON sp.subproject_id = p.subproject_id
JOIN projects proj ON proj.project_id = sp.project_id
WHERE p.subproject_id = $1
  AND c.relevant_for_reports = true
  AND proj.checks_default_unit_id IS NOT NULL
  AND EXISTS (SELECT 1
FROM check_quantities cq
WHERE cq.check_id = c.check_id
  AND cq.unit_id != proj.checks_default_unit_id)
ORDER BY c.label
